commands.review_summary:
This PR rewrites the `gh-issues` skill's reviews-only follow-up guidance to group review comments by root problem, process groups sequentially, and add deterministic checkout/reply instructions.

PR surface: Docs +23. Total +23 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows fork mode is part of the current skill contract while the new checkout recipe hardcodes `origin`, and the new resolved-thread rule lacks a matching data fetch. I did not execute the skill because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer revision for the two instruction defects plus after-change real behavior proof; this should not be routed to automated repair while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: docs(gh-issues): redesign PR review follow-up flow
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The gh-issues review-follow-up flow previously grouped review comments only by PR, which could fan out overlapping fixes and leave related inline comments without coordinated replies.

## Why This Change Was Made

This updates the skill instructions so review follow-up work is grouped by root problem, processed sequentially per PR, checked out deterministically, and replied to across every related comment after the fix.

## User Impact

Operators using `gh-issues --reviews-only` or watch mode get clearer review-worker handoffs, fewer duplicate branch mutations, and more complete reviewer replies.

## Evidence

- `python3` focused inspection of `skills/gh-issues/SKILL.md` frontmatter and required phrases
- `git diff --check`

Not run: `corepack pnpm vitest run src/skills/loading/env-path-guidance.test.ts` did not finish before the 120s command timeout/SIGTERM while dependencies/build setup were running.
target.author: valomedia-yatsar-agent
